parameters.name: list_campaigns
parameters.description: Lists all active campaigns in the Google Ads account. Returns campaign ID, name, status, type, and budget.

parameters.name: get_campaign
parameters.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific campaign by its ID.

value.campaignId: ={{ $fromAI('campaignId', 'The ID of the campaign to retrieve.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: create_campaign
parameters.description: Creates a new campaign. Requires name, status (e.g., PAUSED, ENABLED), advertisingChannelType (e.g., SEARCH), and an existing campaignBudgetId.

value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', 'Name of the new campaign.', 'string') }}
value.campaignBudgetId: ={{ $fromAI('campaignBudgetId', 'The resource ID of the budget to attach.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: update_campaign
parameters.description: Updates an existing campaign's name or status.

value.campaignId: ={{ $fromAI('campaignId', 'The ID of the campaign to update.', 'string') }}
value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', 'New name of the campaign. Leave empty if unchanged.', 'string') }}
value.status: ={{ $fromAI('status', 'New status (PAUSED, ENABLED). Leave empty if unchanged.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: pause_campaign
parameters.description: Sets a campaign's status to PAUSED.

value.campaignId: ={{ $fromAI('campaignId', 'The ID of the campaign to pause.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: enable_campaign
parameters.description: Sets a campaign's status to ENABLED.

value.campaignId: ={{ $fromAI('campaignId', 'The ID of the campaign to enable.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: remove_campaign
parameters.description: Sets a campaign's status to REMOVED (deleted).

value.campaignId: ={{ $fromAI('campaignId', 'The ID of the campaign to remove.', 'string') }}

parameters.jsCode:
if (items.length === 0 || !items[0].json.results) return [];
return items[0].json.results.map(row => ({ json: row.campaign || {} }));

if (items.length === 0 || !items[0].json.results) return [];
return items[0].json.results.map(row => ({ json: row }));
